scenario.name: Basic UAS responder
scenario.send:
SIP/2.0 200 OK [last_Via:] [last_From:] [last_To:];tag=[pid]SIPpTag01[call_number] [last_Call-ID:] [last_CSeq:] Contact: <sip:[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Av-Global-Session-ID: 00fe2c47-42d9-4801-9379-5b83ad7d0000 Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=- 15916683 1 IN IP4 [local_ip] s=- c=IN IP4 [local_ip] b=TIAS:64000 t=0 0 a=avf:avc=n prio=n a=csup:avf-v0 m=audio 41532 RTP/AVP 8 101 a=rtpmap:8 PCMA/8000 a=rtpmap:101 telephone-event/8000 a=fmtp:101 0-15 a=ptime:20

INVITE sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port];transport=[transport] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=z9hG4bKbcefbe26d75c41e8a9a2050568d886e[pid] From: [$us] To: [$them] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 101 INVITE Contact: <sip:[field0]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Max-Forwards: 70 Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: 0

ACK sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port];transport=[transport] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=z9hG4bKbcefbe26d75c41e8a9a2050568d886e[pid] From: [$us] To: [$them] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 101 ACK Contact: sip:[field1]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport] Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=- 1509186683 2 IN IP4 [local_ip] s=- c=IN IP4 [local_ip] b=TIAS:64000 t=0 0 a=avf:avc=n prio=n a=csup:avf-v0 m=audio 415320 RTP/AVP 8 101 a=rtpmap:8 PCMA/8000 a=rtpmap:101 telephone-event/8000 a=fmtp:101 0-15 a=ptime:20
SIP/2.0 200 OK [last_Via:] From: [$Bye1From] To: [$Bye1To] [last_Call-ID:] CSeq: [$Bye1Cseq] Contact: <sip:[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Content-Length: 0
